reference: Good morning, sir. I am Rahul, weighing ninety kilograms, and I have been on hypertension medication for the last two years. Actually, I am fed up with the tablets; if I take them, my blood pressure is normal, otherwise it is not. I have started practicing yoga for the last month. Is there any sort of diet that can help me get rid of the blood pressure medication forever? Please help me because I am just thirty years old, and I have a baby who is one point five years old. So please help.
text: Good morning, sir. I am Rahul, weighing 90 kilograms, and I have been on hypertension medication for the last two years. Actually, I am fed up with the tablets. If I take them, the blood pressure is normal. Otherwise, it is not. I have started practicing yoga for the last month. Is there any sort of diet that can help me get rid of the blood pressure medication forever? Please help me, because I am just 30 years old, and I have a baby who is 1.5 years old. So please help me.
